landing.title:
Luis Espinoza
IA-Driven Product Engineer
landing.message: AI-Driven Product Engineer with 5+ years building scalable mobile and web applications that impact millions of end users and finance teams across 500+ companies in LATAM. Specialized in React Native and TypeScript, I ship production features for FinTech products like Mendel and Pago Facil, and I use Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Copilot and Warp to create agents, skills and workflows that accelerate delivery without compromising quality.

impact.label: Companies operating on Mendel
impact.description: Mendel serves more than 500 companies across Argentina, Mexico, Colombia and Chile.

launches.label: Downloads on FinTech apps
launches.description: Contributed to Pago Facil development with 500K monthly active users on iOS and Android.

leadership.label: Developer enablement
leadership.description: I build agents, skills and commands with Claude Code to speed up scaffolding, reviews, testing and releases.

stack.title: Stack & AI Arsenal
stack.description: React Native, TypeScript, Firebase, AWS, Redux powered by AI acceleration: Cursor for intelligent refactoring, Claude Code for context-aware suggestions, Codex for complex problem-solving, GitHub Copilot for rapid prototyping, and Warp for terminal efficiency. Clean Architecture patterns ensure every line ships with confidence.

product.title: Mobile development for FinTech
product.description: I build React Native apps for spend management, cards, budgets and corporate travel with complex integrations and performance in mind.

delivery.title: AI-Powered Development Velocity
delivery.description: I integrate Claude Code, Codex, Copilot and Warp into concrete workflows so teams ship faster without sacrificing quality or architecture.

partnership.title: Technical collaboration
partnership.description: I work with product, design, backend and QA to turn complex requirements into clear, secure and maintainable experiences.

skills.title: SKILLS
skills.intro: Mobile-first engineer shipping production-ready features across B2B FinTech, consumer wallets and EventTech platforms. Powered by AI tools and battle-tested in apps with 1.5M+ downloads and products used by 500+ companies. Here's how I turn complex requirements into elegant, scalable solutions.

product.title: Mobile & Web Development
product.description: Architect and ship scalable applications with React, React Native and TypeScript, from consumer wallets to white-label corporate spend products.
product.bullets: Build iOS and Android apps with React Native focused on corporate cards, budgets, transactions and travel experiences.|Develop modern web applications with Next.js, React and TypeScript with a strong focus on performance and DX.|Integrate complex APIs, authentication, payment flows, push notifications and real-time data systems.

engineering.title: Architecture & AI Tools
engineering.description: Apply Clean Architecture and enable AI-first workflows for the team.
engineering.bullets: Design agents, skills, slash commands and orchestrators with Claude Code and Codex to standardize scaffolding, code review, testing and releases.|Architect clean, maintainable codebases using MVVM, MVCP and clear separation of concerns in multi-brand apps.|Build scalable infrastructure with Firebase, AWS Lambda, PostgreSQL and cloud-native services.

enablement.title: Collaboration & Continuous Delivery
enablement.description: Work efficiently in agile multidisciplinary teams.
enablement.bullets: Collaborate closely with product, design, QA and backend teams.|Participate in agile methodologies, continuous releases and high-pressure deliveries.|Maintain quality code with Git, testing and clear documentation across multi-brand environments.

quote.text: The intersection of mobile architecture, FinTech products and AI-assisted developer enablement. I do not just write code faster: I build systems and workflows so the team ships better.
quote.author: Development Philosophy

ethos.title: ETHOS
ethos.intro: Empathy from philosophy sharpens my product thinking. Precision from engineering supports multi-brand FinTech apps for cards, budgets and travel. AI tools (Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Copilot, Warp) multiply my speed and the team's speed without sacrificing craft.

media.label: Curiosity in practice
media.caption: Always learning—philosophy, systems and craft to match ambition with delivery.
media.alt: Illustration of Luis reading a book

ethos.story: I start by understanding the problem and the business rules; in FinTech, a clear flow matters as much as a good implementation.|I work with clean architecture and well-separated responsibilities to sustain mobile products shared across brands, features and environments.|I use AI operationally: agents, skills and commands that turn repetitive tasks into consistent, auditable and faster processes.

0.description: Building iOS and Android features for corporate spend, cards and travel management on a multi-brand React Native architecture.

1.description: Worked on the PSP solution and shipped key improvements to Pago Facil and Western Union for 1.5M+ downloads.

2.description: Developed an event platform with end-to-end features, real-time calendar and digital ticketing.

0.quote: React Native architecture for B2B FinTech: budgets, physical and virtual cards, transactions and white-label experiences from one shared codebase.
0.author: Product delivery

1.quote: Claude Code, Codex, Cursor and Copilot are not decoration: I use them to build agents and workflows that improve reviews, testing and delivery speed.
1.author: Developer enablement

works.title: WORKS
works.intro: Real-world projects where technical quality drives business impact. From corporate spend platforms trusted by 500+ companies in LATAM to consumer FinTech apps with 1.5M+ downloads and production EventTech systems: these are living products, not demos.

Mendel.name: Mendel
Mendel.description: I build and maintain new features for Mendel's iOS and Android apps, a regional platform for corporate spend management, cards and travel. I work on a multi-brand, white-label React Native architecture that supports budgets, transactions and operational flows for enterprise customers across LATAM.
Mendel.highlights: Ship cross-platform features for budgets, transaction control, physical and virtual card management, PIN changes and card pause flows from a single React Native codebase.|Contribute to a multi-brand white-label architecture that enables client-specific experiences from the same shared codebase without brand forks.|Collaborate with Product, Design and Backend to deliver secure, high-performance flows in a high-traffic B2B FinTech environment with changing business rules.|Build AI-first internal enablement with Claude Code: agents, skills and commands that standardize scaffolding, code review, testing and release workflows for the mobile team.
Mendel.result: Impact: regional product used by 500+ companies across LATAM for corporate spend, cards and travel.

meta.role: Mobile & AI Developer - Expense & Travel Tech

Pago Fácil & Western Union.name: Pago Fácil & Western Union
Pago Fácil & Western Union.description: As a Mobile Developer at Bizland Tech, I contributed to a mission-critical PSP (Payment Service Provider) solution that powered Pago Facil's 1.5M+ downloads and 500K monthly active users. I shipped production features for Western Union integration, improved app stability and resolved P0 incidents affecting real financial transactions.
Pago Fácil & Western Union.highlights: Architected PSP integration layer supporting multiple digital wallets (Western Union, local payment providers) with transaction-level reliability.|Shipped production features using React Native, TypeScript, Redux for state management, and Firebase for real-time data sync.|Reduced crash rate by 40% through performance profiling, memory optimization and proactive error boundaries.|Resolved P0 production incidents with <30min response time, maintaining 99.9% uptime during peak transaction hours.
Pago Fácil & Western Union.result: Impact: 1.5M+ downloads, 500K monthly active users and improved stability.

0-Registros.name: 0-Registros
0-Registros.description: Zero-to-one experimental platform blending poetry, generative visuals and technology. Built a multi-language Next.js experience with p5.js animations and Firebase to support live performances.
0-Registros.highlights: Designed immersive storytelling with adaptive layouts and typographic systems.|Implemented a real-time creative engine combining p5.js scenes with curated writing.|Deployed bilingual monorepo with CMS-like authoring and staging for exhibitions.
0-Registros.result: Impact: Showcased at digital art festivals with seamless uptime during live readings.

Hybeans App.name: Hybeans App
Hybeans App.description: Built the flagship mobile experience (iOS & Android) for Hybeans EventTech platform, enabling real-time social interaction, e-commerce and ticketing for live events with thousands of concurrent users.
Hybeans App.highlights: Architected end-to-end mobile flows: Firebase Auth, real-time social feeds, live event booking system and in-app checkout processing payments during live events.|Built robust notification system with Firebase Cloud Messaging, deep linking navigation and analytics tracking (Mixpanel) covering complete user journey.|Delivered features under tight event deadlines with zero downtime during peak traffic, coordinating across design, backend and QA teams.
Hybeans App.result: Impact: Enabled 15K+ attendees to manage tickets, networking and purchases during live events.

FastForm.name: Fast Form
FastForm.description: Co-founded and engineered FastForm, a SaaS automation platform that transforms how teams create Google Forms—reducing 2-hour manual processes to 2-minute AI-powered workflows using GPT-4, CSV imports and visual builders.
FastForm.highlights: Architected full-stack SaaS product: GPT-4 powered chat interface, CSV parser with validation, drag-and-drop form builder and draft management system.|Built production app with Next.js 15 (App Router), React Server Components, TypeScript, Tailwind and Vercel deployment—achieving <1s page loads.|Integrated OpenAI API with streaming responses, Google Forms API for programmatic creation, OAuth 2.0 authentication and MercadoPago subscription billing.
FastForm.result: Impact: Teams cut form creation time from hours to minutes with auditable automations.

Push Notify.name: NOUS - Push Notify
Push Notify.description: Built a secure operations console for NOUS to orchestrate mass push notifications across their mobile ecosystem.
Push Notify.highlights: Implemented admin onboarding with service credential management and role-based access.|Added campaign segmentation, scheduling and live delivery telemetry dashboards.|Hardened Firebase Cloud Messaging pipelines with audit-ready logging and monitoring.
Push Notify.result: Impact: Reduced manual push campaigns while keeping GDPR-compliant messaging.

Filoweb.name: Filoweb
Filoweb.description: Designed Filoweb, an educational experience guiding newcomers through the history of philosophy with interactive storytelling.
Filoweb.highlights: Crafted narrative UX with timelines, author journeys and responsive layouts.|Optimized accessibility and performance to support classroom usage on any device.|Structured modular content so educators can publish new chapters without touching code.
Filoweb.result: Impact: Expanded the philosophy program reach to 5K+ readers annually.

Hybeans Web.name: Hybeans Web
Hybeans Web.description: Extended Hybeans to the web with conversion-driven landing pages, booking flows and personalization.
Hybeans Web.highlights: Built booking engine with real-time availability, payment checkout and confirmation flows.|Created customizable member profiles with social features and team dashboards.|Optimized React bundling with lazy loading and code-splitting to reduce initial load by 40%.
Hybeans Web.result: Impact: Boosted partner bookings and sponsorship conversions across LATAM.

AEG Hornos de Cerámica.name: AEG Ceramic Ovens
AEG Hornos de Cerámica.description: Delivered an operations platform for AEG Hornos de Cerámica, unifying marketing site and CRM backoffice for specialized technicians.
AEG Hornos de Cerámica.highlights: Developed CRM with customer segmentation, pricing management and suggestion pipelines.|Integrated TinyMCE email editor, Resend API and WhatsApp automations in one hub.|Implemented validations, pagination and media handling to keep data quality high.
AEG Hornos de Cerámica.result: Impact: Centralized operations and reduced manual follow-ups by 60%.
